settings.highlight_text: Order before 2:30 PM IST for same-day dispatch
settings.usp_2: GST invoice included on every order

settings.heading: Will it fit your printer?
settings.body: Type your printer model. We check against the verified compatibility list set on this product.

settings.title: Outbound dispatch
settings.body: Stick, scan, ship. Mid-volume warehouses use these for 500–5,000 daily orders.

settings.title: Custom-print labels
settings.body: Two-color print on cream stock for D2C unboxing.

settings.title: Invoice pouches
settings.body: Pasted to outer boxes so couriers don't lose the bill.

settings.title: Fragile & hazmat
settings.body: Pre-printed warning labels — fragile, this side up, do not stack.

settings.heading: Why choose
settings.subheading: Bulk-friendly pricing, transparent invoicing, fast dispatch.

settings.question: Do you offer GST invoices?
settings.answer: Yes — every order ships with a GST-compliant invoice. Enter your GSTIN at checkout.

settings.question: Can I get a sample first?
settings.answer: Yes — request a free sample pack. Ships in 2 business days, no charge.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: Manufacturing defects — full replacement. Wrong size or change of mind — return within 7 days if unopened.

settings.question: Do you do custom print?
settings.answer: Yes — minimum order 5,000 units. Send us your brief on the custom-print page.
